reviews.name: accounts/111/locations/222/reviews/AbZc-single-1
reviews.comment: Best coffee in town. The staff remembered my order on visit two.

reviews.name: accounts/111/locations/222/reviews/AbZc-single-2
reviews.comment: Good food, a bit slow on a Saturday but worth the wait.

reviews.name: accounts/111/locations/222/reviews/AbZc-single-4
reviews.comment: Found a hair in my salad. Manager apologised but didn't comp the meal.

reviewReply.comment: Hi K., so sorry — please reach out and we'll make it right.

reviews.name: accounts/111/locations/222/reviews/AbZc-single-5
reviews.comment: Waited 40 minutes for a table I had reserved.
